common.noPermission: You do not have permission to use this command.
common.commandError: An error occurred while executing this command.
common.setupRequired: Some features are restricted for the bot to function fully efficiently. Use the /setup command on this server for the bot to function fully efficiently.

guildCreate.setupDM:
Hello! Thank you for adding me to **{{guildName}}**.

To get started, please go to your server and type `/setup` to configure the leveling system.
guildCreate.setupPublic: Hello {{ownerTag}}! To get started with the leveling bot, please type `/setup`.

setup.panelDesc: Select a Log Channel from the menu below to activate the system. You can also adjust the XP cooldown.
setup.finalNote: Users can now earn XP. Level up notifications will be sent to {{channel}}.
setup.existingSetupDesc:
An active setup already exists in this server.

⚠️ **If you continue, the current configuration will be completely deleted from the database and a fresh setup will start.**

This action cannot be undone!
setup.warningFooter: Fresh setup is recommended for database hygiene.
setup.testMessageFooter: This is a setup test message.
setup.testFailed: Could not send test message! (Check bot permissions)

top.title: 🏆 Leaderboard
top.noData: No data available for this period yet.
top.empty: No data available for this period yet.
top.heavyQueryCooldown: This command (Monthly/Weekly/Daily) is on a server-wide cooldown. Please try again in {{seconds}} seconds.

rank.noData: You don't have any XP yet. Start chatting to earn XP!
rank.userNotFound: This user could not be found in the server.
rank.cardError: An error occurred while generating the rank card.
rank.isBot: 🤖 Bots do not have rank cards.

xp_ignore.added: ✅ **{{target}}** ({{type}}) has been added to the ignore list. XP is now disabled.
xp_ignore.removed: ✅ **{{target}}** ({{type}}) has been removed from the ignore list. XP is enabled.

setup.description: Starts the initial setup for the XP bot (Log channel, etc.).

top.description: Lists the top XP earners in the server.

rank.description: Shows your or another user's level rank.

xp-ignore.description: Disables/Enables XP for specific channels or roles.

setlog.description: Sets the channel for level up notifications.
setlog.success: Level up log channel set to {{channel}}.

setcooldown.description: Sets the XP cooldown time (in seconds) after gaining text XP.
setcooldown.success: Text XP cooldown set to {{seconds}} seconds.

setlevelrole.description: Assigns a role to be given at a specific level.
setlevelrole.success: Role {{role}} will now be awarded at Level {{level}}.
setlevelrole.hierarchyError: I cannot assign this role because it is higher than my own. Please move my bot role above the reward role.

setlevel.0error: The level cannot be negative or 0.
setlevel.isBot: You cannot set the level of a bot.

resetxp.description: Resets ALL XP and level data for this server.
resetxp.confirmMessage: WARNING! You are about to permanently reset ALL XP and level data for ALL users in this server. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?
resetxp.success: All XP and level data for this server has been reset.
resetxp.error: An error occurred while resetting XP.

help.description: Displays the bot's command list and usage information.
help.title: Help Center
help.embedDesc:
Select a category from the menu below to view commands.

Bot language: **English**
help.noCommands: No commands found in this category.

setlevelmessage.description: Sets a custom level-up message for the server.
setlevelmessage.title: Level Up Message Configuration
setlevelmessage.variablesDesc:
• **{user}**: Mentions the user
• **{level}**: Shows the level
• **{guild}**: Shows the server name
setlevelmessage.prompt: Please type your new custom level-up message in this channel.
